action_set_definitions.name: get_sensor_readings
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time sensor data for a specific equipment ID on a production line. Returns suction pressure, fluid temperature, and acoustic noise levels.

equipment_id.description: The unique identifier for the equipment (e.g., 'Feed_Pump_P101').

action_set_definitions.name: get_pump_design_specs
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves technical specifications for a pump, including the Net Positive Suction Head Required (NPSHr) and design fluid properties.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_npsh_margin
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the NPSH available (NPSHa) based on suction pressure and temperature, then returns the margin ratio (NPSHa / NPSHr).

action_set_definitions.name: get_maintenance_records
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the maintenance database for recent repair events, seal replacements, or reported leaks for a specific asset.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_thermal_adjustment
action_set_definitions.description: Determines the exact temperature reduction in Celsius required to raise the NPSH margin ratio to a specific target.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_diagnostic_report
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final root cause analysis and remediation plan to the system.

state_description.production_line_metadata: General info about the active production line and current batch.
state_description.hidden_fault_ground_truth: The actual underlying cause of defects, used by the model to generate observations but never revealed to the agent.
state_description.sensor_current_values: Real-time readings for all sensors on the line including noise levels.
state_description.maintenance_history_db: A database of past maintenance events for the equipment.
state_description.quality_metrics: Aggregation of defect rates or measurement deviations for the current batch.
